title: Godzilla (2014)
synopsis: Navy officer Ford Brody discovers his scientist father was right about a secret monster. The military struggles to stop Godzilla and two parasitic MUTOs from mating in San Francisco. Godzilla ultimately destroys the MUTOs and returns to the ocean.
highlights: Godzilla's first MonsterVerse appearance. Tone: grounded disaster film.

title: Kong: Skull Island (2017)
synopsis: A 1973 expedition to the uncharted Skull Island encounters Kong and discovers a hidden ecosystem of Titans. The team must survive and escape while a soldier seeks revenge against Kong.
highlights: Set in 1973. Introduces Hollow Earth theory. Post-credits ties to wider universe.

title: Godzilla: King of the Monsters (2019)
synopsis: Eco-terrorist Madison Russell's mother releases King Ghidorah from Antarctic ice, unleashing a global alpha call that awakens Titans worldwide. Mothra and Godzilla battle to stop Ghidorah's extinction agenda.
highlights: Most Titans in a single film. Godzilla's nuclear supercharge. Mothra sacrifice.

title: Godzilla vs. Kong (2021)
synopsis: Kong is led through the Hollow Earth to find a power source. Apex Cybernetics secretly uses it to power Mechagodzilla — which is taken over by Ghidorah's consciousness. Godzilla and Kong team up to destroy it.
highlights: First Hollow Earth exploration. Mechagodzilla reveal. Godzilla-Kong alliance.

title: Godzilla x Kong: The New Empire (2024)
synopsis: Kong discovers a primate civilisation in the Hollow Earth enslaved by the Skar King, who controls Shimo. Godzilla must absorb enough energy on the surface to face the threat while Kong leads a rebellion below.
highlights: Skar King and Shimo introduced. Kong's B.E.A.V. arm. Godzilla pink evolution.

title: Monarch: Legacy of Monsters (S1)
synopsis: Two siblings discover their late father had ties to Monarch. Following his trail across decades, they uncover the organisation's secret history alongside a soldier who encountered Godzilla in 1959.
highlights: Best MonsterVerse storytelling. Kurt Russell and Wyatt Russell as same character.

title: Godzilla: King of the Monsters (1954)
synopsis: A massive prehistoric creature awakened by nuclear testing devastates Japan. Scientists debate whether to use the Oxygen Destroyer — a weapon more dangerous than Godzilla himself.
highlights: The original. Gojira. The entire franchise begins here. Required viewing.

title: Godzilla Raids Again (1955)
synopsis: A second Godzilla battles Anguirus over Osaka in the first ever Titan-vs-Titan conflict captured on film.
highlights: First monster-vs-monster. First Anguirus appearance.

title: King Kong vs. Godzilla (1962)
synopsis: The first crossover event — a pharmaceutical company captures Kong and uses him to fight Godzilla.
highlights: First colour Godzilla film. First Godzilla vs. Kong.

title: Mothra vs. Godzilla (1964)
synopsis: A greedy businessman exploits Mothra's egg. Mothra sacrifices herself to protect Japan from Godzilla.
highlights: Mothra's most heroic outing. Considered one of the best Shōwa films.

title: Ghidorah, The Three-Headed Monster (1964)
synopsis: King Ghidorah arrives from space. Godzilla, Rodan, and Mothra must form an unlikely alliance to defend Earth — the first Titan team-up.
highlights: First Ghidorah appearance. First multi-Titan alliance. Pivotal in the franchise.

title: Godzilla vs. Biollante (1989)
synopsis: Godzilla's cells are spliced with a rose and a dead girl's DNA, creating the massive hybrid Titan Biollante.
highlights: Most creative Titan in franchise history. Underrated Heisei gem.

title: Godzilla vs. King Ghidorah (1991)
synopsis: Time travellers from the future claim to be preventing Godzilla from destroying Japan — but their real agenda creates Ghidorah.
highlights: Time travel plot. Origin retcon. Mecha-Ghidorah debut.

title: Godzilla vs. SpaceGodzilla (1994)
synopsis: A crystalline cosmic entity formed from Godzilla's cells arrives from space, threatening Earth.
highlights: SpaceGodzilla debut. MOGUERA's final appearance.

title: Godzilla vs. Destoroyah (1995)
synopsis: Godzilla is going into nuclear meltdown. Meanwhile Destoroyah — born from the Oxygen Destroyer — emerges. The most emotional Godzilla film ever made.
highlights: Godzilla's "death." Junior's sacrifice. Franchise-defining emotional climax.

title: Godzilla (Millennium) (1999)
synopsis: A direct sequel to the 1954 original ignores all previous films. Godzilla is back and a crisis management agency must stop him.
highlights: Millennium era begins. Back to basics approach.

title: Godzilla, Mothra and King Ghidorah (2001)
synopsis: In this continuity, Ghidorah is a guardian deity of Japan. Godzilla — possessed by war dead — is the villain.
highlights: Unique concept: Ghidorah and Mothra as heroes. Godzilla as horror villain.

title: Godzilla Against Mechagodzilla (2002)
synopsis: Japan builds Kiryu using the bones of the 1954 Godzilla. When Godzilla's roar reactivates the original's cellular memory, Kiryu goes rogue.
highlights: Kiryu's debut. Emotional core: soldier bonding with mech. Best Mechagodzilla design.

title: Godzilla: Final Wars (2004)
synopsis: Aliens release every monster on Earth. Godzilla must fight them all. Godzilla destroys the American Godzilla in 9 seconds.
highlights: Most Titans in a single film (non-MV). Action-heavy finale to the Millennium era.

title: Shin Godzilla (2016)
synopsis: A massive creature emerges from Tokyo Bay and evolves in real time. Japan's bureaucratic government struggles to respond faster than the creature can adapt.
highlights: Political satire. Godzilla as Fukushima metaphor. Stunning final form.

title: Godzilla: Planet of the Monsters (2017)
synopsis: Humanity fled Earth 20,000 years ago after Godzilla's emergence. A crew returns to take back the planet.
highlights: Animated trilogy. Unique timeline. Godzilla Earth is the largest Godzilla ever: 300m.

title: Godzilla: City on the Edge of Battle (2018)
synopsis: Survivors discover the ruins of Mechagodzilla have evolved into an entire city-sized weapon.
highlights: Mechagodzilla City concept. Mid-trilogy.

title: Godzilla: The Planet Eater (2018)
synopsis: A void-born Ghidorah arrives to consume Godzilla and all matter. The trilogy concludes with a philosophical confrontation.
highlights: Most philosophical Godzilla film. Void Ghidorah concept.

title: Godzilla Singular Point (2021)
synopsis: A researcher and engineer independently investigate a mysterious signal and a red dust phenomenon as classic Kaiju emerge across Japan.
highlights: Hard science fiction plot. Best animated Godzilla series. Complex narrative.
